title: The Primal Hunter 13
author: Zogarth
description: With Nevermore done and dusted, it’s back to Earth where the fight for the Milky Way Galaxy is about to begin... But first, a fun trip to the moon with Jake’s best-buddy space worm, Sandy.

title: Operation Bounce House
author: Matt Dinniman
description: AN INSTANT NEW YORK TIMES BESTSELLER A man must fight for his planet against impossible odds when gamers from Earth attempt to remotely annihilate it in this epic, fast-paced novel from the New York Times bestselling author of the smash-hit Dungeon Crawler Carl. All colonist Oliver Lewis...

title: System Clash
author: SunriseCV
description: In preparation for things to come, Derek spent most of his time in Cydaria making it safe for all of his friends and companions. He saw Thomas off to the Academy, helped Brandi with materials for crafting, and more.

title: Azarinth Healer, Book Six
author: Rhaegar
description: Ilea survived the eclipse on Erendar, and she didn’t return alone. With the Meadow settling in Hallowfort and her third class finally unlocked, Ilea finds herself looking for new ways to test and improve her powers.

title: A Parade of Horribles
author: Matt Dinniman
description: It’s off to the races in the explosive eighth book in the Dungeon Crawler Carl series.

title: Bog Standard Isekai: Benighted
author: Miles English
description: Brin has conquered the nightmares that once plagued him, and now his goal is to master the power of his class—illusion. With a new skill that lets him split his mind and juggle multiple thoughts, his imagination is the only limit.

title: Unmapped
author: Dakota Krout
description: Joe the Ritualist trusted his faction leader too much, not seeing Tatum’s blind spot before it was too late, and a catastrophic surge of Divine Energy left his Mana Channels in ruins, his skills in tatters, and his future uncertain.

title: 1% Lifesteal, Volume 4
author: Robert Blaise
description: After the banishment of its abusive rulers, Repentawa will need more protection than ever before. Especially with the calamity heading towards the Northern Belt.

title: The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loop 3
series: The Stubborn Skill-Grinder in a Time Loop
author: X-RHODEN-X
description: Having awakened a ground-breaking Celestial-rarity skill at the climax of his fight against the Eldritch Avatar, Orodan's problems have suddenly grown bigger. Otherworldly attention. The champions of various worlds come seeking to capture him for their own factions.

title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 5: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
author: XKarnation
description: Ashlock's ascension to the Nascent Soul Realm attracts all the wrong attention. It turns out a spirit tree calling down the wrath of heavens and forming an Inner World is quite the spectacle, so Vincent Nightrose—an ancient threat that has loomed over Ashlock and his sect for far too...

title: Book of the Dead 4: Vengeance
author: RinoZ
description: Tyron has bided his time and amassed his strength, but for how long will he be willing to wait for his vengeance? The rebellion grows stronger every passing day while the Noble houses attempt to purge the corruption of heresy from the people.

title: Reborn as a Demonic Tree 6
author: XKarnation
description: There is a newborn evil god—and his name is Ashlock.

title: Werewolf Standoff!: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: JKSManga
description: A lycan-powered punk with a heart of gold finds himself under attack by a lethal new breed of enemy as this thrilling LitRPG fantasy series continues.

title: Void Forged: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Plum Parrot
description: Victor Sandoval—aka Lord Victor, Duke of Iron Mountain—has continued to expand his legendary status fighting for the kingdom of Gloria in the world of Rhun, where savage duels between champions are the ultimate deciders of fate. But his trials in the arena pale in comparison to what comes next.

title: The Path of Ascension Book 10.5
author: C. Mantis
description: Echos can come in as many flavors as there are sources. They are all unique, but few more so than an Ascension. Matt, Liz, and Aster are off to fight in a war their predecessors started two hundred years ago, but the Empire marches on, and so too do those whom the Ascenders affected.

title: Dual Class 3
author: Arthur Inverse
description: Drake has entered a transformed Earth, one reshaped by the System and teeming with deadly opportunity. But survival now means more than just leveling up. As a marked Forerunner, he’s caught the attention of ancient Primordials who see him as both threat and entertainment.

title: Savage Awakening 7
author: Adastra339
description: Zane championed Earth to victory in the Beginning of the End. Now the final war looms, and he has just 100 years to power himself up to become an elite of all of Dragonspire.

title: An Undead Glitch
author: Chris Philbrook
description: Seth Willard is broke, sick, and running out of time. A single dad drowning under bills and a cancer diagnosis, his last chance comes from a desperate gamble: taking a job as an NPC in a real world, fully immersive zombie survival experience.

title: Couriers Outbound
author: Pirateaba
description: Schemes are afoot, both grand and wretched alike. But all plots come to light, even the ones buried deepest... and once again, The Wandering Inn connects to these great events.

title: Shadow of the Holy Child
author: K. Georgiades aka PathofPen
description: Percy has finally fought his way free from his family's province, seizing a cache of elixirs and putting his next promotion within reach. That is, if he can get a chance to cleanse his cores while evading practically the entire population of the planet.

title: Stray Cat Strut 7: A Cyberpunk LitRPG
author: RavensDagger
description: Cyborg samurai Catherine LeBlanc pulls out the big guns—literally—when aliens unleash an apocalyptic weapon in the seventh book of this cyberpunk adventure.

title: Preservation [Dramatized Adaptation]
author: Seth Ring
description: Insane cult trying to undermine the stability of society? Powerful mage whose very presence unmakes the world? John doesn’t care. He’s getting married. After rescuing Katrine, sealing himself into a manaless state, and defending against the most dangerous beast tide the world has ever seen...

title: Falling Gold
author: Seth Ring
description: Torn apart, both body and soul, and bound to the figure and memories of the Fifth Prince of the Empire of Kell, Mateo has been thrust into the center of a political maelstrom.

title: Loopbreaker: Book 1
author: Shawn Wilson
description: The hardest part of being a noble’s first son? Nothing—you inherit most of it. Being the ninth son means you inherit war.

title: Shadow of the Hunter: An Apocalypse LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: On the path to salvation, power is earned in blood and every choice comes with a cost, in this heart-pounding epic from the author of Death: Genesis.

title: Crucible of Sundered Loyalties: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Tommy Kerper, SourpatchHero
description: In the fifth book of this fantasy adventure, the journey's not over just because a big boss battle is won.

title: Reborn Healer
author: ghost flower
description: Legendary healers can save cities from the brink of death with a word, but warriors can destroy them just as quickly. Ren will become both.

title: Dreams of Power
author: Tom Elliot
description: Michael has been playing the Game. Growing in strength. Slaying his foes. And avoiding entanglement with the Powers. But the time is fast coming when that will no longer be possible. Almost a Power himself, Michael must answer the question: is he ready? Are his people?

title: The Affinity Collector
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: At only 8 years old, Weldin had just had his dual Affinities bestowed upon him by the Goddess Athera when he ended up in a Nexus Rift far exceeding his Level.

title: Archmage's Ire
author: pirateaba
description: The greatest [Mage] of Izril has not been seen in eight years. Yet, like the King of Destruction, it is time to awaken. However, the Archmage of Izril is not quite asleep, and not quite awake. Is she trapped, or is there more going on?

title: The Path of Ascension 11
author: C. Mantis
description: A century into the war, the Ascenders aren't the only ones who are tired. Fighting three against two the Empire, even with all of its advantages, can only fight to a slow and bloody retreat as more of its border worlds are occupied.

title: The Broken System: An Isekai LitRPG
series: A Budding Scientist in a Fantasy World
author: Acaswell
description: Amid a total System collapse, a courageous young woman must work quickly to find the cause, as this wildly inventive fantasy adventure continues.

title: Too Stubborn to Die 1
author: B. F. Huups, Sir Bedivere The Mad
description: Fear of death never stopped Aaron from doing something dangerous. Now actual death can't either.

title: Regressor Sect Master 2: A Xianxia Progression Fantasy
author: Spaizzzer
description: Book two of this new Xianxia Fantasy series by Spaizzzer, the best-selling author of Tree of Aeons.

title: Arcanist in Another World
author: Bleeding Tears
description: Valens is the youngest Life Archmagus the Empire has ever seen. His mastery over Resonance allows him to hear the frequencies of the world and correct them, healing even the deepest wounds.

title: Wild Era 3
author: David North
description: Kelin Wildfire's new life is blazing with potential and he has a lofty goal: to become the Sovereign of Souls and the Lord of Reincarnation.

title: Apocalypse BREAKER 3
author: Aaron Renfroe, Sean Oswald
description: Return to the gritty world of Apocalypse BREAKER, where the overpowered hero begins to see the true scale of the System.

title: World Walker: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Plum Parrot
description: Once, Victor Sandoval was just a boy from Tucson. Now, he's a powerful titan of war. On the world of Dark Ember, humanity has fallen under the evil dominion of vampire lords—masters of death magic.

title: Into Darkness: An Apocalypse LitRPG
author: Ranyhin1
description: In the seventh installment of this apocalyptic adventure, a vampire must battle merciless scions to achieve honor as he descends farther into the abyss.

title: The Aetherborn 1
author: Deadalus
description: Thorne’s world is thrown into chaos when he uncovers the truth about his heritage. He is an Aetherborn, tied to an ancient power that others would kill to control.

title: Shattered Glory
author: Seth Ring
description: From bestselling LitRPG author Seth Ring—creator of the Titan and Battle Mage Farmer series—comes the next thrilling escapade in an epic series of alien contact, fast-paced military action, and superhuman adventure.

title: Skill Eater 3
author: Magnus Grey
description: Edge has conquered the Savage Garden and claimed the core manufactory for Puppet Town, but the conflict with the Crimson Claws has entered a deadly new stage.

title: You Are Summoned 5
author: Dean Henegar
description: Earth continues to struggle as the system infuses our world with mana. Creatures and those seeking power lurk on the fringes and it’s up to Rico and the other summoned beings to hold back the tide.

title: Tropes of Doom
author: Eric Dontigney
description: Introverted computer programmer Terry Williams’ life is not exciting. It never has been, and he is A-OK with that. So, the last thing he expects on a hiking trail at the park is for Truck-kun to roar up and vehicular homicide him straight into another world.

title: Level One God 2
author: Zachary Scott
description: A quiet climb back to godhood was never in the cards. Word is spreading about a young man in a strange helmet. A Wood rank who punches above his weight. A nobody who keeps surviving things he shouldn't. In taverns, they tell stories of him.

title: The Hunter's Call: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: JKSManga
description: Gary Dem and his Howlers are running wild these days: claiming territory, making money, and preparing to hit the big time. Howler heavyweight Innu has been called to a gathering of the Altered Hunters Association and is chosen to go on a year-long, cross-country monster-hunting trip.

title: Threads of Destiny: Volume 6
author: Yrsillar
description: Ling Qi's time in the Argent Peak Sect has come to an end. She is the Baroness Ling, retainer to the heiress of the Emerald Seas, and her duty is to oversee and mediate the Summit, which she and Cai Renxiang have struggled to make take place.

title: Path of the Deathless, Book One
author: OstensibleMammal
description: Whatever kills Shiv only makes him stronger. An outcast without a Path, Shiv was never supposed to amount to anything. The System ignored him, and his town despised him. But when he is murdered defending his home, the universe makes a mistake: It gives him a second chance.

title: You Are Summoned 4
author: Dean Henegar
description: Things are heating up on Earth, and Rico is doing his best to keep a lid on the chaos. But it’s not easy to help deal with the threats at home when you’re randomly summoned away at a moment’s notice.

title: Of Hunters and Immortals, Book 1
author: Shadowwing
description: The path of immortals is a long one. Jiang doesn't have time to take it slow. Jiang is a hunter in a quiet village far from the world of sects, spirits, and soaring swords. When powerful bandits destroy his village and steal his family, he resolves to do anything to get them back.

title: Death: Genesis 11: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: To ascend to godhood, Zeke must first descend into Hell—and face torment like never before—in the penultimate volume of this dark fantasy adventure series.

title: Draconic Ascension
author: L. E. Miranda
description: All Michael can do is watch as a System descends upon Earth, sending the first wave of living beings to a deadly Tutorial Zone where survival seems impossible. Facing an inhospitable landscape filled with monstrous enemies, Michael must adapt quickly if he hopes to make it through.

title: Warborn
author: Seth Ring
description: Warborn is the ninth book in the Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG series from Seth Ring, bestselling author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series, set in the world of Nova Terra and starring the unforgettable Thorn.

title: Imperator
author: Seth Ring
description: From Seth Ring, bestselling author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series, Imperator is the tenth book in the Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG series set in the world of Nova Terra and starring the unforgettable Thorn.

title: Incorruptible
author: Seth Ring
description: Incorruptible is the eleventh book in the Tower Series, a GameLit/LitRPG series from Seth Ring, bestselling author of Battle Mage Farmer and The Titan series, set in the world of Nova Terra and starring the unforgettable Thorn.

title: Bunny Girl Evolution 2
author: Sir Bedivere the Mad
description: Elise is finally back above ground; but she's not home free just yet. The Gray family is still missing, and their situation is a little more complicated than she first thought.
narrator: Dorrie Sacks, Justin Thomas James, Ryan H. Reid, Jeff Hays, Jack Fields, Tess Irondale, Jessica Threet

title: So I'm a Spider, So What?, Vol. 16 (light novel)
series: So I'm a Spider, So What? (light novel)
author: Okina Baba, Tsukasa Kiryu, Jenny McKeon McKeon - translator
description: THE PRICE WE PAY.Sacrifice the goddess to save humanity, or sacrifice humanity to save the goddess? …What kind of sadist would throw the entire world into chaos with an impossible choice like that?! D, obviously. The head honchos of the Word of God religionare doing all they can to tip the...

title: Citation: A Magical Library LitRPG Adventure
author: K.T. Hanna
description: A shadow of chaos lurks in the Library's foundational pillars, and treachery sneaks in through unseen cracks.

title: [Traveling] Merchant Crab (Book 2): A LitRPG Adventure
author: H0st
description: Continue following this unlikely merchant on his unexpected quest for riches, sweetness, and someone to fix his broken rock!

title: Catastrophe at the Collapsing College: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Ryan Rimmel
description: One bad roll catapulted them into a new world and now they have to deal with the greatest danger of all... higher education.

title: Death: Genesis 12: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: At long last Zeke Blackwood has become a primordial. He wields mana powerful enough to combat the gods of the Ethereal Realm and prevent the destruction of the universe. The quest has taken many lifetimes.

title: The Lost Bloodline 5
author: M. Tress
description: Winter has passed and the world returns to life once more. Spring brings with it new life, new opportunity, and new problems.

title: Fluff 3: A Wholesome LitRPG
author: RavensDagger
description: A supervillain plans to dethrone the local criminals and become the new kingpin of an otherwise peaceful city in this fantasy superhero series.

title: Cultivating Infinity: A LitRPG Apocalypse
author: DabossUnberogen
description: One day, Sam was flipping burgers. Next, he was leveling up to survive. Stuck in a dead-end job with no future, Sam longed for something more: power, purpose, a reason to keep going. The System gave him all of that and more... at a devastating cost.

title: Industrial Mage: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Nectar
description: Jump into a fast-paced new Isekai LitRPG Adventure featuring a rune-based magic system, dungeon delving, an intelligent MC, deep worldbuilding, unforgettable characters, kingdom-building, and so much more.

title: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild 2
series: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
author: Kenny King
description: The second book in an action-packed, epic, and hilarious LitRPG fantasy series about an underdog who was never supposed to be a hero—but when he’s forced to manage a cursed magical farm, he proves himself far more resilient (and luckier) than any monster—or god—expected. Nicholas Parker...

title: Blood of the Void
author: WillPowah
description: After defeating the eldritch nanomachine tide and saving the Seramist Isles, Kay’s worries aren’t over. His triumphant return home to a flourishing kingdom is cut short by the hordes of vampyr swarming into his territory from the ravaged wasteland.

title: Dao of Money: A Xianxia Progression Fantasy
author: Extra26, T.C. Liyanage
description: Chen Ren is reincarnated into a realm of cultivation overrun by sects, beasts, and clans full of murderous people. Most would be terrified. He sees a new world of opportunity. Only problem. He's weighed down by his predecessor's mountain of debt.

title: Low-Fantasy Occultist: An Isekai LitRPG Adventure
author: Persimmon
description: Nicholas Crowley is used to scraping by in a world where magic is dying. The modern age has left the arcane behind, and the few remaining practitioners fight over scraps like starving dogs.

title: All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One Skill, Not Them All!
series: All Jobs and Classes! I Just Wanted One Skill, Not Them All!
author: Comedian0 L
description: Ludger was supposed to be just another forgotten soul, reborn into a quiet life under the care of his young mother, Elaine. With nothing but a mysterious system in his vision and the faint promise of growth, he resigned himself to learning the humble trade of cooking.

title: His Own Man: A Cyberpunk LitRPG
author: Warby Picus
description: While others just want to come out on top in an apocalypse, Truth hopes to take down an evil god, in the epic final installment of this urban fantasy series.

title: The Fifth Law of Cultivation
author: KrazeKode KrazeKode
description: The end draws near, as a demon god stirs awake. Lu Jie died in the final battle, leaving a remnant divine tree that now holds back the Demon God from tearing through the world. But all is not yet over. Secrets lie in the realms between life and death, where the past touches the future, as the...

title: Lamplighter Academy: A Post-Apocalyptic LitRPG Adventure
author: Kal Griffith
description: Sean died under a collapsing warehouse roof. Twenty years as a firefighter, and that was how it ended. Except it wasn't the end.

title: Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primordial Era
series: Ancient Being Predecessor of the Primordial Era
author: Z. Robert Nights
description: Being mistaken for an Ancient Predecessor usually results in heavenly benefits. Not for James Anderson. After being thrown into an isolated training realm, he is quick to figure out that there is no tutorial. No guidance. No ancient being to fully unlock his system.

title: Undersea Reincarnation
author: CalCroissant
description: Follow Henry, a small Trickster Octopus trying to survive in a vast and unfamiliar ocean.

title: Empire in the Clouds
author: Daniel Weber
description: Kers’ dungeon flew too high. Now he has the attention of a god. Therrill, the ruling deity of the planet whose very atmosphere Kers resides in, is on the warpath, hellbent on his destruction. Worse, his dungeon fairy, Selena, has been taken captive and stands accused of treason.
narrator: Justin Thomas James, Annie Ellicott, Jeff Hays, Dorrie Sacks

title: Time Breaker
author: Aster Loka
description: Once upon a time, a mageblade-in-training lost his best friend. His soul refused to let her go, and his unformed soulspell developed the ability to revert the timeline to the week before her death. It wasn't enough. No matter what he did, said, or tried, her death was set in stone.

title: Immortality Starts with Generosity 3: A Cultivation Progression Fantasy
author: Plutus
description: The third installment of a Cultivation fantasy series with a unique progression system starring an MC who gains power through gifting things to others.

title: Duskbound 3
author: D.E. Sherman
description: As Velik searches for new clues to unravel the mystery of the dungeon seeds, a divine beast stalks his path. Its mere presence violates the Compact between the gods, drawing them into the conflict and escalating it to the point where humanity’s existence is threatened.

title: How I Became the World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks: Volume 5
author: Kenny King
description: The new book in the witty, action-packed WORLD'S STRONGEST WARRIOR LitRPG series, perfect for fans of DUNGEON CRAWLER CARL and HE WHO FIGHTS WITH MONSTERS, where Chuck encounters an undead nightmare and must do what he does best - cleave through them all one by one. Chuck Taylor didn’t ask to...

title: Gunboat, Book 2
author: Dean Henegar
description: It’s time to expand the fleet. Captain Watkins must build a new, more powerful ship for his core if he wants to survive the kobold pirates, cannibalistic halflings, and the other deadly foes that await him in the void of space.

title: Long Eared Farm
author: Mark Alan
description: Two thousand years after entering cryosleep to escape an alien invasion, Doctor Lance Winters awakens to a transformed Earth where humanity is an endangered species and survival is a game managed by a ruthless alien overlord.

title: The Dark Healer: Book 10
author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
description: The past never dies, it only lies in wait. The necromancers are awakening an ancient power. The lines between different epochs are blurring. While his enemies weave their deceitful web, Maximilian Richter invokes an ally who remembers a pre-abomination world.

title: Necromancer Supreme in Another World
author: N. Robert Cor
description: Jim has no life outside of gaming, spending years dedicated to a single VRMMO and maxing out one character to heights unachieved before: a Necromancer Supreme and his summons. Then, one day, he wakes up inside the same game he has spent thousands of hours playing.

title: The Sword Saint and the Saintesses: A Second Chance LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: D STAHL
description: Aaron Hueber witnessed the rise of demons from below and the invasion of horrors from beyond. He saw monarchs slain, champions betrayed, and worlds fall until reality itself was unmade.

title: How I Became the World's Strongest Warrior By Using Basic Attacks: Volume 4
author: Kenny King
description: Chuck Taylor has crushed gods, broken the Tower, and solo’d nightmares that exist outside reality itself. But numbers don’t lie, and level 58 is still 28 billion experience points away. After helping his friends shatter their level caps and destroy the Devourer (again), Chuck sets his sights...

title: Traitor Saintess
author: AbyssRaven
description: Book 6 in this LitRPG Series about an underdog rising up to be the idol her new world didn't know it needed. Hestia may start small, but one day her power will match her determination.

title: Survivor's Descent: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
author: T. A. L. Deason
description: Andrew was a 30-year-old engineer living his best life until millions of alien orbs fell from orbit and altered reality itself.

title: The Healer's Way, Book 14
author: Oleg Sapphire, Alexey Kovtunov, Jennifer E. Sunseri - translator
description: Why, oh why, are so many loath to have dealings with Healers? In other worlds, at least, everyone knows how powerful Healers of his rank are. But why is it no one realizes how great Healers are at negotiating and concluding contracts? And, moreover, they're fabulous managers. Although that might...

title: The Healer's Way, Book 15
author: Oleg Sapphire, Alexey Kovtunov, Jennifer E. Sunseri - translator
description: Events are intensifying around Mikhail Bulatov. The emperor is starting to wonder how he could be just an ordinary Healer, and he's even considering entrusting him with a matter of special importance.

title: Stray Cat Strut 8: A Cyberpunk LitRPG
author: RavensDagger
description: It's back to school for Cat Leblanc, where the cyborg samurai gets high marks in ultraviolence against both gangsters and aliens, in this cyberpunk adventure.

title: Fleabag 3: A Monster Evolution LitRPG
author: SomeoneToForget
description: It's been nearly a millennium since wolves prowled the earth. They're only spoken of as mythical destroyers of life. But one solitary wolf, born a simple, primal beast, is becoming the very monster of legend feared by both humans and otherworldly creatures.

title: A Druid's Wrath: An Apocalypse LitRPG
author: Nicholas Searcy
description: Grief, vengeance, and redemption collide as Elijah's journey reaches new depths in the fourth book of this LitRPG epic from the author of Death: Genesis.

title: Aether Earth 1953: Do Not Go Gently
author: Matthew Kent
description: The skies burn green and violet as strange auroras ripple across the night. Radios crackle with ghost voices. Then comes the message—visions behind people’s eyes, screens lighting up where no television should be. They call it The System.

title: Towerbound Book 2: Scrapbound
author: Samson Chui
description: In Book 2 of the Towerbound series, the Scrap Rats finally have a home base—and a target on their back. Dungeon spawn are shifting, guilds are sending spies, and the in-game economy is breaking down.

title: Rules of Biomancy
author: NJ Buller
description: For almost half a century, Elijah had kept his Core sealed. It allowed him to stay in the shadows, to run his little alchemy shop on the outskirts of the slums without fear, but it also limited him. It made him weak.

title: Depthless Hunger 2
author: Sarah Lin
description: Having witnessed gods fighting during the great incursion, Kai and Zae Zin Nim travel across the continent, hungry to attain those reaches of power. Their search leads them to the riches of Krysal, whose crystal cities tell stories of well-fed citizens... and strength that can be bought.

title: You Are Summoned 6
author: Dean Henegar
description: Being summoned to protect a burger joint from a monster, teach a class at the magic academy, or dealing with film critic cats, is something Rico is almost used to at this point.

title: Idle Village Hero 3
author: Leon West
description: They wanted submission. They're getting revolution.

title: Player Reached the Top: LitRPG Series, Book XI
author: Rick Scar, Dark Matter - translator, Valeria Kornosenko - introduction by
description: Meeting an old enemy will lead to a chain of unexpected discoveries, encounters, and a contract that you don't want, but you have to make, because evil never slumbers.

title: Oath of the Survivor 4
author: James Meyer
description: When Kyle and C.H.A.D.D. are approached with a job suited for their unique talents, they jump at the opportunity. However, all is not as it seems on the lush world of Er'Mithren.

title: Sound and Silence: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Alexander Wales
description: Juniper Smith always dreamed of attending a magic college. Now he's enrolled at the Athenaeum of Sound and Silence, where students learn to bend velocity and freeze motion itself. There's just one catch: he's there as a government operative, hunting threats that lurk in the shadows between lectures.

title: The War Game: Mad Scientist
series: The War Game: A LitRPG Space Adventure
author: August Aird
description: One war is over—but more danger lurks in the galaxy.

title: Titan's Descendant
author: Triopals
description: For two years, Nathan has been a failure. Cursed with an abysmal energy absorption rate, he's the weakest disciple in the Verdant Spire Sect and faces certain expulsion.

title: The Chosen ArchMage: A LitRPG Fantasy
author: Mark Alan
description: Ian Vale was never meant to be a hero. He was just a healer with a leaky mana pool and an academy that repeatedly rejected him.

title: Isekai Magus Omnibus
author: Han Yang
description: Damien was a simple man, cruising on the highway of life. A goddess of temptation lures him into a deal he scoffs at. To him, superstition is for the foolish. Small problem: she's real, her ritual works, and Damien is magically teleported into a strange new realm.
narrator: Landon Reid, Erin Bateman, Marissa Parness, Alex Perone

title: Flesh and Secrets
author: Fizzicks
description: Greater political influence and power always comes at the cost of new enemies.

title: Evolution
author: Cale Plamann
description: Katherine Debs clawed her way up from the slums to the peak of the corporate world, a true rags to riches success story. Now her enemies can't show themselves publicly, banished as they are to the shadows by the monopoly she holds on advanced alien technology.

title: Wayward: Falling: An Isekai LitRPG
author: T. A. Star
description: Phoenix faces her greatest threat yet, all the while juggling dresses and dancing, monsters and maniacal politicians, in the third book of this LitRPG series.

title: Towerbound, Book 3: Super Ren
author: Samson Chui
description: Book 3 of Towerbound cranks everything up. The Scrap Rats are rising—and so is a world-ending dragon.

title: Stormborn Ascendant 2: A LitRPG Apocalypse Adventure
author: K. H. Nulls
description: Months have passed since Tyler’s battle in the Main Branch of the Stormchasers, and factions from all over the Flooded City swarm to the site of Tyler’s old home. A trio of Adepts—each more powerful than the last—have been sent to hunt him down, but they’re just the scouting party.

title: Machine Mage: An Isekai LitRPG
author: J. Drude
description: Coming off his first victory over the Scourge, Ryan Kotes is a bona fide hero to the people of Eclipse. But the war is far from over. The zombifying infection is still festering throughout Ralqir, and Ryan won't quit until he beats every last bit of it to a pulp.

title: Tailor on the Roof: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Bosloe
description: Asterfal is a city of staggering contrasts: high glamour and abject destitution, corrupt politicians and an exploited working class, ostentatious greed and quiet suffering. SJ arrives set to be inaugurated into the city's council as the ambassador of Killic.

title: Tunnel Rat 4
author: Walrus King
description: Milo is back again, causing trouble in the game world of Genesis. But, is it only a game? He has suspicions that things aren't so simple, and needs to dig deeper. And while he does that, he's slowly coming out of his shell.

title: Spark Raiders: Science Fiction LitRPG
author: Han Yang
description: In the 40-second century, the cure for death isn't made in a lab, it's stolen from a nightmare. Spark is a biological narcotic that halts aging, but it refuses to grow in captivity. It cannot be farmed, synthesized, or controlled.
narrator: Renée Nolen, Phillip Polite, Stone Smith

title: Monster Tamer Academy 4
author: Robyn Wideman, Matt Herrmann
description: Dirk and his friends are off to the South Capital where some of the Region’s strongest wild monsters await them, as well as answers, hopefully. While at the new tamer academy, Dirk will have to navigate his growing notoriety and help his friends deal with unexpected matters of their own.

title: Hunting and Herbalism 5: A Druid LitRPG
author: Leif Roder, Synonymoose
description: Set on destroying the hellish realm of Cormaine once and for all, Zalia seeks the ultimate healing cure—and reveals Endaria's greatest evil in the process.

title: World War: An Apocalypse LitRPG
author: Ranyhin1
description: The balance of Panu is tested by otherworldly forces who seek to bring its vampiric ruler to his knees in the eighth book of this apocalyptic adventure.

title: Second Chance Swordsman 5
author: Jakob Tanner
description: It’s been three and a half years since Sam went back in time, and a new historical tragedy approaches. A powerful telepathic Traveler has kidnapped the queen of Sam’s nation and is holding an entire desert capital under his mental control.

title: Settlement Stone 2
author: Rhea Zulu
description: Imani has managed to build a stable home for his people, keeping it safe and hidden in the mountains. Now he wishes to upgrade his growing settlement of Silverfall into a Dukedom by recruiting more people and amassing enough strength to defend them all.

title: Forgotten Summoner
author: Kurth Andrard
description: What would you do if the system you knew was out to kill you?

title: Demonstorm: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Luke Chmilenko, Harmon Cooper
description: The full power of his mythic ancestry propels a young archmage to new heights in the second installment of this epic LitRPG fantasy adventure.

title: Gladesbale Grove
author: Edwin M. Griffiths
description: Being a cog in the machine of an uncaring corporation has dulled Shawn's desire to see his dreams come true. He has accepted that he will never be a park ranger, fire watch, or anything fun. Instead, he works his keyboard to clean up other people's messes.

title: Dark Matter Ascension: Book 5
author: SerasStreams
description: Jace Seren, Tier 10 Ascendant, the only person who wields both Dark Matter and Void through The Cosmic System, delved into the Astral Verge. A journey outside of his Universe that took him through the realm wrought from the shared dreams and nightmares of all Universes.

title: Idle Village Hero 4
author: Leon West
description: The Nine Gods of Ionia have finally noticed what Harper's become: an isekai with the power of a Dungeon Lord, something that should be impossible. Something that threatens the very order they've maintained for so long. Their verdict is already decided. He must die.

title: Fear the Reaper
author: C.J. Carella
description: The System has arrived. Soon, magic will permeate the entire planet, society will be disrupted, and Dungeon-spawned monsters will walk the Earth.

title: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild 3
series: How to Succeed in Monster Farming After Getting Rejected by the Hero Guild
author: Kenny King
description: A ticking clock. A dying world. One man’s impossible promise. Nick wanted peace, just a quiet farm, a thriving crew, and a future with Syllia. But when dimensional contagion strikes, infecting her and everyone who’s lived too close to his cursed reality, peace dies screaming. Now, with only...

title: Demonic Sect Elder and the Great War: An Isekai LitRPG
author: Kalzara
description: A total nobody who became a somebody is quickly realizing he can still become a dead body in the third installment of this battle-packed xianxia series.

title: The Reluctant Dungeon 3
author: L. Eclaire
description: Theo had thought that after saving the city of Rosewind (again…) he would finally be done with all his adventuring nonsense. Sadly, the universe had a different opinion.

title: Village Building
author: Tristan Rye
description: Owen gazes at his newest asset—an underground slime habitat. Here, he’ll raise baby forest slimes and harvest goo to be sold at market. It’s one of many new investments. As the farm expands, so do his opportunities.

title: My Big Goblin Space Program 2: An Astronaut Reincarnation LitRPG
author: Scott Warren
description: Chris thought he had it all. But then his dreams of space travel ended in the worst way possible, and he was reincarnated as the goblin king of Rava. Now he leads a loyal-but-pathetic gang of blue-furred boneheads.

title: Dear Spellbook
author: Peter J. Lee
description: The complete Timeloop Progression Fantasy saga of Tal the Sorcerer and his mysteriously sentient spellbook. Join Tal as he battles monsters, hangovers, and time itself in this three-book box set, containing volumes 1-3 of Peter J. Lee’s Dear Spellbook trilogy.

title: Oath of the Survivor 3
author: James Meyer
description: The Practicum. An exam where death is a reality, and failure can cost everything. Kyle and C.H.A.D.D. are no strangers to life and death situations, but will their experience be a blessing or a curse?

title: Phoenix Healer
author: JM Jacobs
description: Armed with legendary flames of life and destruction, mysterious fighting instincts, and the ability to resurrect, Monica is embroiled in a fight for survival while battling cultists, dungeons, and the Old Gods.

title: Cultivation Is a Game 2: A Xianxia LitRPG
author: Kalzara
description: In the second installment of this xianxia series, Kai's gaining power and attracting attention, but can he keep juggling the lies without dropping the act?

title: Obelisk: System Integration 6
author: Conor Malachi
description: End game. This is it—everything the humans have been working on will either save them… or lead to every last human being dying. Warren's good with that. What he's not good with is Ani, Raven, Andy, Louise, and Buck dying. Warren is not good with that.

title: Judicator Jane 7
author: Brian Rouleau
description: After a wild dash across the Mandalas on the continent of Kaldara, Jane is one step away from her goal. But the path ahead is perilous.

title: Reaper's Madness
author: J.J. Thorn
description: Teleported somewhere against her will—twice—Claire must come to terms with the escalating challenges of a City grappling with the System and the advantages/disadvantages that can provide.

title: Red Meat Steak and the Creator God's Judgement
series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
author: Ren Eguchi, Kevin Chen - translator
description: With another dungeon behind them, Mukohda and party (and Elrand for some reason) take a well deserved rest to collect themselves before hitting the road again. And now, with many more levels, Mukohda has earned another new Tenant.

title: Idle Village Hero Omnibus, Books 1-4
author: Leon West
description: Harper thought retirement meant hanging up his glaive, but when the Dungeon Lord offers him something no adventurer has ever been given—a chance to build a sanctuary from the ground up—he can't resist. Finally, a quest where success means creation, not destruction.

title: Cultivation Is a Game 3: A Xianxia LitRPG
author: Kalzara
description: Kai's growing in power and skill, but his grand ambitions face grim reality, in the thrilling third installment of this xianxia adventure series.

title: Reinitializing the Apocalypse: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Timothy McGowen
description: During the first Apocalypse, the System Lords forgot one tiny detail—they left William Ward out. While everyone else got classes and powers, he kept doing what he does best: working in the shadows as a legendary hitman.

title: Machinist of Mana 2: A Progression Fantasy
author: Wandering Agent
description: An otherworlder navigates courtly customs, magical machinations, and entangled alliances in the second book of this captivating steampunk isekai series.

title: Thoroughly Fogged
author: H.C. Mills
description: Sick of toiling his life away on the Thistlethorn estate, Rylan tries everything he can think of to unlock his first Skill—from juggling, to sewing, to singing—until one day, he unexpectedly succeeds.

title: The Crisis of Power
author: Arthur Stone
description: The enemy is strong. There are a lot of them, and they are pressing the attack forward. Me, I don't have enough supplies and weapons for my army. Heck, I don't even have an army to speak of.

title: The Twilight Company
author: V.A. Lewis, C.C. Tyrion
description: Tempest, fired from his job and dumped by his girlfriend, opens a package from his former employer—only to be transported into a realm of magic, monsters, and cute goblin thieves who can’t keep their hands out of his pockets.

title: Academy of Legends 2
author: Vic Void
description: War is coming. En Ward survived his first months at Ascension Academy, forming powerful bonds with beautiful Marked women and discovering abilities that shouldn't exist. But his enemies haven't been idle.

title: Towerbound, Book 3.1: Side Stories
author: Samson Chui
description: This is a collection of short stories written after each main Towerbound book was published—so for the best experience, listen to Books 1–3 of the Towerbound LitRPG series first.

title: Death Under a Green Sun: A LitRPG Portal Fantasy
author: Kyle Johnson
description: Sheriffs on flying monsters. Marshals dueling with magic cards. Showdowns fought with creatures instead of pistols. Epic beasts destroying whole towns. And me, stuck in the middle once more....

title: Undersea Reincarnation 2
author: CalCroissant
description: Henry and Maurice have finally reached the Great Current, a deadly stretch of ocean where only the strong survive. They expected monsters. Endless battles. A brutal climb toward power. What they didn’t expect… was civilization.

title: Talent Killer
author: KamikazePotato
description: The shadow of betrayal lurks in every corner. Adam has taken control as the new Lord of Penumbria, defeated two fearsomely strong Ghosts, and stolen multiple abilities using his new Talent.

title: Otherworlder Survival Guide
author: S. Monroe
description: Lena was just an ordinary girl in an ordinary village until the sky cracked open and an Otherworlder fell through.

title: Summoner Academy
author: Connor Shepard
description: Deadly monsters roam the land, and the only way to stop them is by killing… or capturing them.

title: Blue World
author: M.E. Merrell
description: The Green Dungeon thrived. Despite the Council's attempt to destroy her, Jennifer Conners, a Blue World soul, remained a viable Dungeon Core in Green World.

title: Unwilling Eldritch Horror of Fortune 3: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Tismon
description: In the third book of this Lovecraftian dark fantasy, a man must battle more cosmic horrors and solve the multidimensional conflicts plaguing their world.

title: Incursion III: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Dennis Vanderkerken
description: As a Titan of a human being, Dii Van Damme embodies this idea. Having mastered the fundamentals of his Stolen Cosmic Power, his expanding arsenal now enables him to transition seamlessly from defense to offense. If enemies from other Realms attack him where he lives, then he can do the same.

title: Summoner's Shadow 4
author: DB King
description: After defeating Volrath and saving the Mortal Realm from his rule, Bran decides to venture on a journey of his own and goes in search of his people. The Worldbreakers. This journey, however, is far more dangerous than he had ever expected.

title: Goddess Soaring
author: Rain Harlow
description: A tower shall rise. It has countless times before. This must be the last, never to fall, persisting forever… The ambitions of The Goddess ascend ever higher — she has her new Heaven, but its purpose remains to take the world.

title: Alpha Agent 2: A Cyberpunk LitRPG - Weak to Strong Progression Fantasy
series: Alpha Agent: A Progression Cyberpunk LitRPG
author: Kevin Do
description: Kodak-Cresh has stolen the Arctic serums. Can the Alpha Corp pull off the miracle heist?

title: The Ruby Magician: A Tower-Climbing LitRPG Adventure
author: D. R. Hudgins
description: An ex-soldier must climb a mysterious, treasure-filled tower to repay his family's debts in the first installment of this thrilling LitRPG fantasy series.

title: The Dark Healer, Book 11
author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
description: The Great Princes' magical games conceal a hidden dimension. Abomination foci turn out to be not merely sources of blight, but portals through which creatures from another world pass.

title: The Dark Healer, Book 12
author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
description: Scoundrels are always afraid of the truth. It reveals their true colors, which are otherwise concealed beneath a veneer of decency.

title: The Dark Healer, Book 14
author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
description: Mages live longer than regular people. Some of them live a thousand years before they even start to grow up. Otherwise, they'd know fighting necromancers was futile. We do not fear death; for us, it's all in a day's work.

title: The Dark Healer, Book 13
author: Alex Toxic, Nadya Lee, Dan Veksler - translator
description: Magical battles alone will not rid the world of Abomination. The necromancer prince Maximilian Richter sets out in search of knowledge that will help create new magical technologies.

title: Shadowborn Exile: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Harmon Cooper
description: A powerful shadow warrior ventures deep into darkness to save his home in this action-packed progression fantasy from the author of the Pilgrim series.

title: The Last Legend Reborn, Book 1
author: Borgy60
description: Rodric Vale spent sixty years as the world's greatest hero. He answered every summons, fought every war, saved every kingdom that asked. He reached Level 100—the only person ever to do so—and became a legend.

title: Reborn as a Demon Hat: A Monster Evolution Isekai LitRPG
author: J. S. Boyd
description: In the action-packed first book of this portal fantasy series, the monster messiah will rise—not the hero they need, but the hat they deserve....

title: Blossoming Path 5: A Xianxia LitRPG
author: Carlos Calma
description: Refugees have arrived from a neighboring village carrying stories of devastation. What first appears to be demonic remnants soon reveals itself as something far worse: the Amethyst Plague, a mysterious affliction that erodes qi and turns cultivation into a curse.

title: Lord of the System
author: Alex Toxic, Furious Miki, Reuben Woolley - Translator - translator
description: A revolution is afoot in Sparta! And not just any revolution: an industrial revolution. Water wheels and mechanical hammers have come to replace primitive labor. That means more ploughs in the fields and more arms for the soldiers. After all, the enemy grows by the day, too...

title: Lord of the System, Book 7
author: Alex Toxic, Furious Miki, Reuben Woolley - translator
description: Babylon has spent a long time spitting down at everyone else from its impregnable walls. It's boasted of the power of its army, the wealth of its treasuries, and the splendor of its beauties. Will it be able to withstand the Barbarian Lord?

title: Faceless Hunter
author: XKarnation
description: Xen isn't your typical Hunter. In fact, he isn't human at all.

title: Smith to the Small Gods
author: Max Vale
description: After decades of bashing, slashing, and executing his way through the ranks of the evil tyrant king, Orin Ironfinger is… tired. Victorious and feared the world over, to be sure, but tired all the same.

title: The Last Portal Jumper: Book 4
author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez - translator
description: I'm getting stronger, and my confidence has always been good. And I'm not the only one who can see it. The system is pushing me more and more into the thick of things, and a question is becoming more and more critical....

title: The Heroes: An Isekai LitRPG
author: A. T. Valentine
description: Rowan wasn't supposed to be a hero, but after becoming one by leading his people to victory against a demonic enemy . . . now he's really got problems.

title: Hard Roads (Warborn, Part 3)
author: JD Glasscock
description: Jeb, Bose and Bogie fell a bit short at getting through the warren that is the Skull and Bones Territory, an avalanche of Greenskins on their tails. Within a stone's throw to the safe haven that is the Emporium they are cornered.

title: Blood City (Warborn, Part 1)
author: JD Glasscock
description: The Crucible of War -- A floating asteroid the size of a small planet carving its way through the universe. Eight Cities, a million participants, death, blood, carnage, control. The Crucible is televised across the cosmos and provides entertainment for the The Great Galactic Empire and its Citizens.

title: Painted Red (Warborn, Part 2)
author: JD Glasscock
description: Jeb has been chosen as a Contestant for the Crucible of War and he refuses to leave his two-year old Cane Corso, Bose, behind. Whatever they face, they will face together. They were supposed to go to a Tutorial where everything would be challenging but fair.

title: Warborn, Part 4: The Emporium
author: JD Glasscock
description: They've made it through the Iron Dungeon but not without a heavy cost, mentally and spiritually, for Jeb.

title: Shattered Light: An Isekai LitRPG
author: A. T. Valentine
description: When he's sent at the king's command to the demon-razed frontier, Rowan is no longer just a spare hero—and it'll take all that he knows and more to survive.

title: Start Menu 3: Quit Game?
author: Kos Play
description: After bringing Isa back and passing a series of trials, Alex has become the new King of Camelot. Now he must rescue his friends after a betrayal by Pi. To make matters worse, a dark entity is on the lose, hellbent on spreading darkness to the whole universe.

title: Apocalypse Reaver 3: A Dark Fantasy LitRPG Adventure
author: TobascoAsako
description: Gilgamesh has finally reached Al-Lazar, the legendary City of Dust. But what he finds is not salvation. It's rot wrapped in gold, and his companions are already coming apart at the seams.

title: Heroes of the Final Frontier 8
author: Dem Mikhailov, Mikhail Yagupov - translator
description: The Brotherhood of the Path, a tight-knit and determined group of five players, finds themselves in one of Waldyra's secret corners. And they find game's rules and laws to be entirely different here in the Forgotten Lands. This is the domain of old-school hardcore eventually deemed too brutal...

title: Sukiyaki and the Blessings of Battle
series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
author: Ren Eguchi, Tristan K. Hill - translator
description: At long last, the time has come. Mukohda and his party of ever-ravenous familiars are finally ready to set foot in the Brixt dungeon, a notorious hellhole famed for being the hardest dungeon in the land!

title: Stone Oven-Baked Pizza and the Elixir of Life
series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
author: Ren Eguchi, Kevin Chen - translator
description: After conquering dungeons and finally getting some leverage over the gods ganging up on him, Mukohda sets his sights on the domestic life. With his new palatial manor fully staffed with trustworthy servants and guards, it seems like as good a time as any to focus on building up his...

title: Grilled Entrails and the Festival of Gluttony
series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
author: Ren Eguchi, Kevin Chen - translator
description: When we last left Mukohda, an unfortunate salaryman who got accidentally summoned to another world from modern Japan, he had bought a house in Karelina and staffed it.

title: Karaage and the Mighty Dragon of Yore
series: Campfire Cooking in Another World with My Absurd Skill
author: Ren Eguchi, Tristan K. Hill - translator
description: Another day, another dungeon!

title: Shadowborn Exile 2: A LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: Harmon Cooper
description: Darkness presses in from lower tiers of the Spiralrealm, and for Attica, survival is no longer enough, in the second book of this thrilling progression-fantasy epic.

title: Strandbinder: A Sci-Fi LitRPG Adventure
author: J. D. Mullenary Sr.
description: In this portal fantasy, a freshly crowned god explores the omniverse and discovers there's more to the world he created than he's been led to believe.

title: Reborn as a Demon Hat 2: A Monster Evolution Isekai LitRPG
author: J. S. Boyd
description: The forces of light and darkness have been locked in war for millennia, all in the name of the fierce god Kaedmon. And Ethan Graham, an average gamer turned all-powerful demon hat (yes, hat), is caught right in the middle of it.

title: Author's Nightmare 3: A Grimdark Isekai LitRPG
author: Ian B. Urns, A. C. Erinle
description: From politics to deception to war, Redacle is facing grave danger—and the friends who created it are the only ones who can save it—in this dark fantasy.

title: Blossoming Path 4: A Xianxia LitRPG
author: Carlos Calma
description: Gentle Wind Village endures even as gathering threats endanger its peace, and Kai must learn what it truly means to stand between the mortal and the divine.

title: Somebody Stop Them: A Superhero/Apocalypse LitRPG
author: Vitaly S. Alexius
description: In the final installment of this witty LitRPG series, Martin consolidates allies, confronts cryptids, and amasses power in his quest for annihilation.

title: Isekai Exorcist 2
author: Dosei
description: Following Ryūta's escape from the clutches of a Summoner with grand plans, he makes his way to the city of Helmstatter to reunite with his friends, but not before getting embroiled in the troubles of an elfin enclave.

title: The Next Conjurer
author: D.D Valo
description: Cairne Obstik thought being a Warlock would be a road traveled alone. He was wrong.

title: Warmaster 9: Stormwatch Citadel
author: Melissa McShane
description: In returning to the north, Aderyn leaves behind the horrors and personal nightmares she suffered in the Southlands. But going north has its own challenges, because the new Fated One’s Destiny quest says only that they must bring peace to the Northlands.

title: Slaughter-Fest
author: Ken Lange
description: Since the apocalypse kicked off with the System’s arrival, Iain Clark has done a lot of things—gathered up several of his friends and family, fought monsters and aliens alike, and thriving all the while.

title: The Last Paladin 3
author: John Cressman
description: Hunter sacrificed his powers to save the Czar’s daughter, but now the world teeters on the edge of annihilation. The Nightlord’s armies march unopposed, and Hunter’s only hope lies with the elusive elves, whose ancient magic can restore his core.

title: Project Tartarus: Apeiron
author: Erebus Esprit
description: To rise, one must be prepared to fall. Reeling from the gulf between himself and the gods, Arche goes to greater lengths than ever before to close the gap. As time presses against him and more gods stir, he must look to the past in order to face the future.

title: Last Save Dave
author: Michael James Ploof
description: Dave Deranger, a middle-aged plumber, was the 1990 Nintendo Champion and an Olympic silver medalist in boxing. Since then, his greatest challenge has been trying to quit smoking and plunging toilets.

title: Level One
author: Chris Kennedy
description: I write romance novels. Or I did. Now I’m learning how to survive in a galaxy that treats combat like a game. After being snatched from Earth and rescued by mercenaries, I discover the universe runs on contracts, credits, and cold math. Stats decide who lives. Levels decide who dies.

title: Earthen Contenders Collection, Books 1-3
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: Against his will, Thaden was transported elsewhere in a big flash of light along with millions of other Humans from Earth, to a place where they would train to become Contenders in a whole new world.

title: Expedition: Into the Rift
author: John B Hammond
description: When Alex left the Air Force, she thought her days of adventure were behind her. But when the United Nations offers her a mysterious assignment, she can't resist. Tasked with leading the first team through a portal to another world, Alex must grapple with the concept of being a leader.

title: 7th Time Loop: The Villainess Enjoys a Carefree Life Married to Her Worst Enemy!, Vol. 3
author: Touko Amekawa
description: Galkhein has officially forged an alliance with Coyolles, and Arnold and Rishe are closer than ever. During a visit to the Grand Cathedral of Domana, which Arnold burns to ash in the future, they bump into the young lady Rishe served as a maid.

title: Detention Dungeon: The Bell Rings No More
author: Kevin Walker
description: Chloe was supposed to turn nineteen in a month. Instead, she’s murdered by a school bus of all things. High school chewed her up and spit her out, every day attacked and bullied by an evil group of girls, the last thing she remembers is their laughter.

title: The Major Arcana: A Satirical LitRPG Progression Fantasy
author: BananaDragon
description: After her novel takes over the world, an author must prevent a devastating apocalypse from descending; at least she knows what happens next.

title: The Last Paladin #5
author: Roman Savarovsky, Julia Fouche - Translator - translator
description: The Empire's elite were finally beginning to face a hard truth: the age of impunity was ending. Every action—no matter how well hidden behind privilege or title—now carried consequences. Understanding that truth was one thing. Accepting it was another. For the most zealous Princes, power...

title: The Last Paladin #6
author: Roman Savarovsky, Julia Fouche - Translator - translator
description: War had been averted—but at what cost? The Empire stood fractured, exposed—and the scent of weakness drew predators who had waited years for this moment. One of them had already made his move, sinking his claws into the Empire's wounded body with a death grip—not to destroy, but to...

title: The Last Paladin #7
author: Roman Savarovsky, Julia Fouche - Translator - translator
description: The Empire is unraveling. Enemies inside and out claw for power while the throne sits empty. Greed plays its part—but it isn't the whole story. What happened in the Imperial Palace made one thing clear: this isn't just politics anymore. Something deeper is moving, hidden and coordinated, its...

title: Cinnamon Bun Volume 7: A Wholesome LitRPG
author: RavensDagger
description: Dungeon explorers! Pirate thwarters! Wedding guests? More adventures await Broccoli Bunch and friends in the seventh book of this cozy fantasy adventure.

title: Totally Spiritual 2: An Urban Fantasy LitRPG
author: Quinn Rivers
description: Hunted by two powerful organizations, a spunky boy risks it all to expand his mystifying new magic as malevolent forces threaten to destroy everything.

title: Sidekicks and Sidequests: A LitRPG Adventure
author: Sir Nil
description: An apathetic introvert accidentally finds himself on the cusp of friendship, heroism, and doom in the third book of this epic fantasy-adventure series.

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime, Vol. 7 (light novel)
series: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime
author: Fuse, Mitz Mitz Vah, Kevin Gifford - translator
description: A gutsy glob in crisis!News of the demon lord Clayman’s defeat by Rimuru shakes the Holy Empire of Lubelius to its core—especially since the chief knight of the nation’s Imperial Guard and captain of the Crusader forces, Hinata Sakaguchi, launched a bold attack on Rimuru not long ago...

title: The Hero Slayers Tempt Fate: A LitRPG Adventure
author: O. S. Marrow
description: When their latest hunt reveals a world-threatening infestation, the Slayers are forced to team up with their rivals, in the third book of this fantasy adventure.

title: All Our Worlds Are Crashing: A Survival Horror LitRPG
author: Tess C. Foxes
description: A high school student turned unlikely hero embarks on a brutal quest to save humanity from vengeful angels in the last book of this dark LitRPG series.

title: Dreamer's Throne 4
author: Seth Ring
description: Surviving a fight with an immortal necromancer should have bought Garrett some peace, but when the Princess he thought was dead shows up on his doorstep, any chance of an easy time slips away.

title: Expansion
series: From Chef To Crafter To Conqueror
author: Gabriel Rathweg
description: Ryo was a chef, an extremely good one at that. That was until the entire universe as he knew it changed. After his spaceship is attacked and destroyed by an enemy armada, he finds himself in a situation he never could have imagined. Sent back in time and to an alternate reality, he has quite a...

title: Embers by the Brook
author: Mike Robb
description: Beth lived long enough to die a hero. She pulled a stranger from a bus’s path, felt the wheels, then opened her eyes beside a moonlit brook in a realm of fractured kingdoms, wizards, and beasts.

title: The Eternal Assassin
author: Wizardly Dude
description: Eternal Assassin

title: Andy in the Apocalypse
author: Plum Parrot
description: Andy wanted a quiet life—just his trailer, the Sonoran desert, and a job that didn’t ask much of him. Instead, he got a front-row seat to Tucson’s collapse. Magic rewrote the rules. Monsters stalked the streets. People mutated—or died.

title: Dungeons & Deliveries: A Dungeon-Core LitRPG
author: A. P. Scribe
description: Broke and rejected by both the Adventurer and Courier Guilds, Alex doesn't slay monsters, but he does need a job before he hits rock bottom―and he'll take whatever he can get.

title: Beef Cutlets and the Bandit King's Treasure
author: Ren Eguchi, Tristan K. Hill - translator
description: Guided by the God of All Creation himself, Mukohda and his familiars have found their way into the treasure-filled lair of a long-dead bandit king.

title: The Last Portal Jumper: Book 5
author: Konstantin Zubov, Celia Alexandra Gonzalez - translator
description: Thunderclouds are gathering over the Empire, and the deadly race continues. I've made new friends, but the number of enemies is growing much faster. Good. The former make for good drinking buddies, and the latter will make for excellent experience!

title: Castle Core 5
author: Milo Storm
description: Now that his town is safe, Wyle moves to thwart the attack on Sparkling Bay. He hopes to destroy Captain Charles’s army and take Queenstown in one smooth stroke, but the Captain has a plan of his own.

title: Magical Explorer, Vol. 3 (light novel)
author: Iris, Noboru Kannatuki, David Musto - translator
description: Still in his first year at Tsukuyomi Magic Academy, Kousuke Takioto continues his freewheeling routine of clearing dungeons with the heroines between bouts of training. However, his tendency to cut class isn’t lost on the other students, who now view him as a slacker. Despite this, Yukine...

title: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in the Real World, Too, Vol. 3 (light novel)
series: I Got a Cheat Skill in Another World and Became Unrivaled in The Real World, Too
author: Miku, Rein Kuwashima, Carley Radford - translator
description: Next level up—become “god’s” pupil! Yuuya Tenjou has obtained all kinds of powerful skills and abilities and continues to live his new lifestyle in both the other world and his home world. In the Weald, he comes across a "divine beast" rabbit! "I'll train you. In exchange, teach me how...

title: The Hero Slayers Die Trying: A LitRPG Adventure
author: O. S. Marrow
description: With more at stake than ever, the Slayers wage a fearless war to rid the world of the Council for good, in the last book of the thrilling fantasy adventure.

title: Chaos Protocols
author: Troy Osgood, Jake Malory
description: When talented but trigger-happy SAS Operator Andrew Rivers takes one last, off-the-books job to clean his slate, everything changes. The mission fails violently, catapulting him and his volatile cargo into an alien galaxy complete with dwarves, orcs, elves, and the stuff of nightmares.

title: Labyrinth of the Mad God
author: Magnus Grey
description: Nick thought his dreams had come true when the System came to Earth. He watched his civilization burn to ash eleven minutes later. But as bad as the apocalypse was, the Mad God Taltos is worse.

title: Path of Lightning
author: Rhea Zulu
description: The godly society, The Deiwos Clan, has obtained a Tower, and like all other gods across the multiverse, they are looking for exceptional players who will provide them with Karma.

title: Mercenary Reincarnated as a Chef
author: Gabriel Rathweg
description: Diamond Lou was the best mercenary assassin the world had ever known. Even the best have to die sometimes. For Lou, that was okay. He tired of all the killing and death. Only, the end never came.

title: Common Sense Is My Superpower
author: Nelson Chereta
description: A man is reincarnated into a fantasy world of magic, swords, and monsters where the people all seem just a little insane. Luckily, Ken has the greatest power of all! Common sense! With the cheat ability of rational thought watch our boy deal with explosion maniacs, masochistic paladins, giant...

title: Apocalypse Healer 4
author: HideousGrain
description: After surviving the impossible, David returns to the Earthen Union forever changed. A god’s heart beats within his chest; an engine of power that no mortal body was meant to contain.

title: Body Cultivation Hurts
author: Apollos Thorne
description: Nathanial Kane had read it all before. It said they had centuries. The demons arrived in ten years. He'd been counted among the strongest. It had all been for nothing. He'd witnessed Earth's end. While dying, Nathan reviewed the only unique spell he'd ever found in the tower. He cast Rebirth.

title: Wraithwood Botanist 3
author: Little Lynx
description: To be accepted as a guardian, Mira embarks on a journey to Tranea Crypt, a dangerous location designed to teach visitors soulmancy.

title: The Wolfbound Warrior: The Aetheris Legacy
author: Jay Redrick
description: If you’re looking for a gritty, immersive LitRPG adventure that doesn’t pull its punches, this book is exactly what you need. It’s packed with intense combat, real stakes, and a protagonist who doesn’t just survive, he fights, claws, and bleeds his way through the horrors that stand in his path.

title: The Legend of Dark Heart 1
author: Alex Villavasso
description: Cursed with a dark power that threatens to slowly erode his humanity, Nolan Crest fights against the monsters and guilds that plague his world, even if that means he’ll one day become a monster, himself.

title: Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World, Book 1
series: Body Refinement in a Beast Tamer’s World
author: Seth Ring
description: Waking up in Borella, a world where mages and their mysterious pets rule everything, Magnus discovers that he is no longer a musician, but instead has become the Tower Master of the Crimson Flame Mage Tower. Some might call it an upgrade, but Magnus isn’t so sure.

title: Wraithwood Botanist 4
author: Little Lynx
description: Mira has obtained the respect of the forest’s guardians. After vowing to protect Areswood Forest from an impending conquering attempt, she seeks answers and powers in Misty Row—the bramble that separates the Fourth and Fifth Domains.

title: Knights Apocalyptica 3
author: Zach Skye
description: The walls are opening. For the first time in three hundred years, the Kingdom of Cindrus will welcome outsiders, and with them, chaos.

title: Modern Magic
author: Beth Williams
description: If the dragons don't kill you, the deadlines will. At the Tower of Jackdaw and Spittlelick, magic isn't wild or romantic. It's regulated, audited, and buried under paperwork. Ivy Armstride is a junior mage trying to survive a workplace where spells misfire, mentors are eccentric at best, and...

title: Unintended Cultivator: Volume 9
author: Eric Dontigney
description: In the Jianghu, there is only the illusion of peace…

title: Shardborn
author: Vic Void
description: The gods are dead. Their power remains. And it's killing the women who carry it. Three hundred years ago, the gods fell. Their divine essence shattered into fragments called Shards—fragments that lodged themselves in women, granting incredible powers while slowly poisoning them from within.

title: Path to Prosperity 2
author: HideousGrain
description: Percy expected a new start at the illustrious Wintermoon Estate, but behind polished walls and noble splendor, he found only cold shoulders and quiet malice.

title: Accidental Champion 5
author: Todd Herzman
description: Xavier, having been unexpectedly thrust forward in the Tower of Champions, is not about to squander his time on the hundredth floor. There are still threats for him to face, still powerful enemies to defeat, and before he leaves, he will wring every ounce of power he can from this opportunity.

title: Wolfish: The Complete Collection
author: G.K. DeRosa
description: Fate has a wicked sense of humor. When I was sixteen, I met the love of my life in magic school. He'd appear exactly once a year at the annual masquerade ball, then vanish... Fast forward to the present: to the night I’m attacked and my hidden wolf emerges.

title: 2026 LitRPG Anthology
author: Justin Marks, J. Arthur Klein, Terry Carter, Ducky Dungeon, Daniel Wisniewski
description: In the 2026 LitRPG Anthology, 10 top litRPG authors will entertain you with their special, never-before-published stories.
narrator: Renée Nolen, Alfie Syme, Dylan Wheeler, Kat Riley, Jonathan Waters

title: Totally Spiritual 3: An Urban Fantasy LitRPG
author: Quinn Rivers
description: A summoner must do what it takes to protect his closest companions as cryptic mysteries and unexpected news make his life ever more complicated.

title: Journey to the Bees: A Dungeon-Core LitRPG
author: Icalos
description: From the author of the Terminate the Other World! series: An unlikely dungeon master must create an awesome apiary army before his enemies smoke them out.

title: Undying Depths
author: Felix Taylor
description: At Centralis Academy, Wulf faces his great test yet.

title: Secrets, Serpents, and Superpowers: A Superhero LitRPG
author: Zane Emerson
description: When the super average play with superpowers, all of Earth becomes a gameboard, in the first book of this thrilling superhero fantasy adventure.

title: The Warden's Reign
author: Shane Purdy
description: The war continues to rage on, but events are stirring, and the war will soon begin to take a back seat. For the Fae Tournament shall commence. A tournament to decide the new ruler of the Fae. But what all does that title mean? And do the fae have any ulterior motives behind the tournament?

title: Enthralled Healer
author: Jonathan Brooks
description: After completing the developmental world of Tarth, the remaining Contenders and Humans from Earth are transported to the world of Plangea.
